name: Pecan Pie 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small nonmetal bowl, melt butter or margarine on 100% power for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
2. Stir in beaten eggs, corn syrup, sugar, and flour. Cook uncovered on 50% power for about 5 minutes, stirring every minute until slightly thickened.
3. Add vanilla and stir. Pour into the pecan pie pastry shell.
4. Arrange pecan halves atop the pie.
5. Cook uncovered on 30% power for 6 to 7 minutes, rotating the dish a quarter-turn every 2 minutes, just until set. Cool before serving.
